body_txt: The logical conclusion of Half-Human Hybrid , Monster Mash and Mix-and-Match Critters . A Hybrid Monster is a creature made up of two or more mythological, alien, monster, or fantasy creatures... or all of the above! It's common for these creatures to be more powerful than the separate component creatures. While the particular possible combinations are essentially infinite, most come about through one of a few basic causes: Sub-Trope to Ninja Pirate Zombie Robot ; this trope exclusively deals with the merger of nonhuman/non-normal-animal creatures. Super-Trope to: See also Non-Human Humanoid Hybrid . Compare Liminal Being , Shapeshifter Mashup , Power-Upgrading Deformation and Partial Transformation . May lead to authors using Hybrid-Overkill Avoidance to limit this.
